gold_weakest_sufficient_missing_lemma: For every admissible graph-semantic input X, cycleOverlapRank X <= colapRank X.

results.defect: Treated the unrestricted statement as open even though the counterexample makes it false as stated.
Added extra open directions beyond the weakest sufficient missing lemma.
Identified cycleOverlap_le_colap itself as the missing lemma instead of the quantified admissible-input domination lemma.
